title: Metaltex Siena 3-Tier Trolley with Wheels - Multipurpose Storage Cart for Home including Kitchen, Bathroom, Office and Garage – White Metal, 400 grams
features: SAVE SPACE: The white 3-tier rolling cart storage cart offers stylish organisation perfect for any home. Fit all your homeware, accessories, tools or dècor

STYLISH & VERSATILE: Our stylish and versatile white Siena trolley on wheels can be used in any room of the house, including the kitchen, the bathroom, the garage, and the office. It comes with four sturdy wheels that rotate 360°, which makes pushing it easy even when loaded

STRONG & DURABLE: This white mesh wire rolling cart made in Italy is made from high-quality metal with low-density polyethene. The kitchen storage cart is strong enough to hold your drinks and kitchen supplies and is easy to clean.

PORTABLE & EASY TO ASSEMBLE: This kitchen storage cart has four 360-degree solid wheels for easy transportation. This utility cart storage requires no tools. Using the simple assembly instructions, this mesh rolling cart can be assembled within 3 minutes.

METALTEX: With over 75 years of experience manufacturing Home Storage Solutions, Laundry Care and Kitchen Tools & Gadgets. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence, our mission is to make life easy by designing and manufacturing everyday intelligent housewares. We are committed to providing new and innovative products. Made in Italy
